# ADR-0000-title

## Context and Problem Statement

What decision is needed, and what context makes it important?

- Driver 1
- Driver 2

- Option 2

## Decision Outcome

Why this option best fits the current context.

## Confirmation

How agents and maintainers can confirm this decision remains reflected in code, tests, architecture boundaries, or operations.
